{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Tomb
| introduced = cradle-10-reaper
}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Tomb]] is half-destroyed with a caved-in roof and a cracked pillar.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c3">''Reaper'', chapter 3</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
